notableEvents.label: Jacob Wilson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Wilson grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Tyler Soderstrom out at 2nd. Jacob Wilson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Wilson rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Wilson grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Tyler Soderstrom out at 2nd. Jacob Wilson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes grounds out, second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Giménez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Carlos Cortes. Kazuma Okamoto scores. Ernie Clement to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Addison Barger GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Addison Barger grounds into a double play, shortstop Jacob Wilson to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Nathan Lukes to 3rd. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 2nd. Addison Barger out at 1st.
